vibe: Elite athleticism, high-energy, tactical precision, competitive.

headings.usage: Hero headers, tournament titles, aggressive uppercase labels.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use generous padding for breathing room but keep dashboard widgets tight.

landing_page.grid: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid (Bento style). Asymmetrical grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
landing_page.hero: Dramatic dark hero image with overlay bg-black/50. Text and CTA aligned left or centered. col-span-full.

dashboards.grid: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6.
dashboards.cards: Flat solid background, 1px subtle border, no heavy soft shadows. Tactical minimalism.

matchmaking.layout: Centered Tinder-style card stack layout. Max width sm (approx 400px). Absolute positioning with framer-motion drag constraints.
matchmaking.card_aspect_ratio: 3:4 portrait or 9:16 for full immersive photos.

surface_styles.cards: Tactical look: border border-border bg-card. Avoid soft shadows. Use sharp 1px borders.
surface_styles.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) as per reference image. High saturation accent color (Neon Green).
surface_styles.glassmorphism: Use for sticky navigation or 'Hold My Spot' modal overlay (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 border-b border-border).
surface_styles.inputs: Shadcn defaults with rounded-md, focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary.

animations.hover: Scale up slightly (scale-105) for cards. Buttons translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow.
animations.page_transitions: Framer motion opacity 0 to 1, y: 10 to 0.
animations.swipe_cards: Framer motion drag='x', with rotate and opacity mappings based on x-offset. Green overlay for 'LIKE', Red overlay for 'PASS'.

components.navigation: Sticky nav with Logo, Links, Theme Toggle, Profile Avatar, and CTA.
components.hold_my_spot: Shadcn Dialog/Modal with tournament details, price breakdown, and confirmation CTA.
components.matchmaking_card: Photo background, bottom-aligned gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 via-black/40 to-transparent) with Name, DUPR rating, Location, and Bio.
components.brackets: Horizontal scrolling flex container with nested match nodes. Connect nodes using borders.
components.tabs: Use Shadcn Tabs for switching between Player, Director, and Admin views if mocking in one page.

icons.style: Bold or Duotone weights for athletic, dynamic feel.

images.description: Pickleball action shot, dramatic athletic portrait
Athletic man portrait for matchmaking card
Man in black tank top portrait
Action shot on court for tournament listing

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, swipe cards) MUST have descriptive, role-based data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='matchmaking-swipe-right-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI focusing heavily on the Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) principles: Dark Mode default, Neon Green (#B6FF3C) accents, tactical 1px borders, high contrast.
Implement light and dark mode toggling (next-themes). Ensure light mode maintains high contrast (use #A3E635 for primary).
Use Framer Motion for the Tinder-style swipe cards on the matchmaking page. Ensure they have drag constraints and snap back.
Use Shadcn UI for structural components (Dialogs, Tabs, Inputs, Cards).
Ensure 'Hold my spot' opens a Shadcn Dialog with pricing info and a confirmation CTA.
Typography: Import Bebas Neue (Headings) and Manrope (Body) via Google Fonts. Use Bebas Neue in uppercase for hero headings and section titles.
Apply pill-shaped `rounded-full` to main CTAs to match reference.
Use strictly the media URLs provided for images. Do not use any placeholder images.
